message:
test(engine): add 8 new integration test files and expand parser contract stability vectors

Add ast_integration, parser_grammar_closure_backlog,
parser_multi_engine_harness_integration, parser_property_regression,
extension_host_lifecycle_integration, frankenlab_extension_lifecycle_integration,
quarantine_mesh_gate_integration, and scheduler_lane_integration test files.
Add parser_grammar_closure_backlog.json test fixture data. Expand
parser_trait_ast with canonical hash pinning vectors and event-IR/diagnostics
contract stability assertions. Update parser_arena_phase1 with handle_audit
and corruption_injection test scenarios. Update remaining integration tests
with latest API signatures and assertion patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
